name: Attack
scalingSummary: Extra Attack class features grant additional attacks per Attack action
summary: Make one melee or ranged weapon attack, or an unarmed strike. Characters with Extra Attack can make multiple attacks when taking this action.

name: Cast a Spell
resourceCostSummary: Expends a spell slot of the spell's level or higher (cantrips cost no slot)
rechargeSummary: Spell slots recharge on a long rest (pact magic on short rest; Arcane Recovery on short rest)
scalingSummary: Many spells can be cast using a higher-level slot for increased effect
summary: Cast a spell with a casting time of 1 action. Requires any verbal, somatic, or material components. If the casting time is a bonus action or reaction, the appropriate classification applies instead.

name: Dash
summary: Gain extra movement equal to your speed for the current turn, after applying any modifiers.

name: Disengage
summary: Your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks for the rest of the turn.

name: Dodge
summary: Until the start of your next turn, attack rolls against you have disadvantage and you have advantage on Dexterity saving throws. You lose this benefit if incapacitated or your speed drops to 0.

name: Help
summary: Choose an ally within 5 feet. That ally gains advantage on the next ability check it makes before your next turn, or on the next attack roll against a creature within 5 feet of you.

name: Hide
summary: Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check to attempt to hide. You must be heavily obscured or have cover, and cannot be clearly seen. On success, you are hidden until discovered or you stop hiding.

name: Ready
trigger: Player specifies a perceivable circumstance that will trigger the readied reaction
summary: Choose an action to ready and a perceivable trigger. When the trigger occurs, you can use your reaction to take the readied action or move up to your speed. A readied spell requires concentration and expends the slot when readied, not when released.

name: Search
summary: Devote your action to searching for something. Typically requires a Wisdom (Perception) or Intelligence (Investigation) check.

name: Use an Object
summary: Interact with an object that requires your action to use. This includes administering a potion, applying a poison, activating a magic item, or any other object interaction beyond the free object interaction.

name: Grapple
summary: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your weapon attacks with a grapple attempt. Make a Strength (Athletics) check contested by the target's Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics). On success, the target is grappled: its speed becomes 0. The grapple ends if the grappler is incapacitated or an effect moves the grappled creature out of reach.

name: Shove
summary: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your weapon attacks with a shove attempt. Make a Strength (Athletics) check contested by the target's Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics). On success, either knock the target prone or push it 5 feet away from you.

name: Improvised Action
summary: Declare any action not covered by the standard actions. The DM adjudicates the outcome, potentially calling for an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw as appropriate.

name: Opportunity Attack
trigger: A hostile creature that you can see moves out of your reach
summary: Use your reaction to make one melee weapon attack against the triggering creature. The attack occurs right before the creature leaves your reach.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
trigger: You take the Attack action and attack with a light melee weapon you are holding in one hand
summary: When you take the Attack action and attack with a light melee weapon in one hand, you can use a bonus action to attack with a different light melee weapon held in your other hand. You do not add your ability modifier to the damage of the bonus attack unless that modifier is negative.

name: Spellcasting (Artificer)
scalingSummary: Half caster (rounds UP — slots start at L1); Intelligence; prepared; tools as spellcasting focus
summary: Prepare artificer spells using Intelligence. Must use tools or infused item as focus. Half-caster slot progression but rounds up (slots start at L1 unlike Paladin/Ranger). 2 cantrips at L1.

name: Magical Tinkering
scalingSummary: Max items = Int modifier (min 1); touch to end effect
summary: As an action, imbue a Tiny nonmagical object you touch with a minor magical property (light, recorded message, odor, visual effect, etc.). Max Int mod items active at once.

name: Infuse Item
resourceCostSummary: 1 infusion known per item; end of long rest to maintain
rechargeSummary: At end of each long rest, infused items remain infused; can swap which are active
scalingSummary: 2 infused items at L2, 3 at L6, 4 at L10, 5 at L14, 6 at L18; 4 known infusions at L2
summary: At end of a long rest, touch nonmagical items to infuse them with magic from known infusion list. Max number of infused items scales with level. Infusions last until you die or replace them.

name: The Right Tool for the Job
summary: With 1 hour of work and thieves' tools or artisan's tools in hand, create any set of artisan's tools. Tools vanish when you create another set.

name: Tool Expertise
summary: Double your proficiency bonus for any ability check that uses a tool you're proficient with.

name: Flash of Genius
trigger: When you or a creature within 30 ft makes an ability check or saving throw
scalingSummary: Uses = Intelligence modifier (min 1)
summary: Use reaction to add your Intelligence modifier to the check or save. Can use after seeing the d20 but before the DM declares result.

name: Spell-Storing Item
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or until all charges used)
scalingSummary: 1st- or 2nd-level spell with casting time of 1 action; Int × 2 charges
summary: At end of a long rest, touch a simple or martial weapon or spellcasting focus to store one 1st- or 2nd-level artificer spell in it. Spell uses your spellcasting ability. Item holds Int × 2 charges. Any creature holding it can use an action to cast the spell using 1 charge.

name: Magic Item Adept
summary: Attune to 4 magic items at once. Craft common or uncommon items in quarter time and half cost.

name: Soul of Artifice
scalingSummary: +1 to all saves per attuned item
summary: Gain +1 to all saving throws per attuned item (max +6). If reduced to 0 HP, can use reaction to end an infusion and drop to 1 HP instead, once per long rest.

name: Arcane Armor (Armorer)
summary: As an action, turn worn armor into Arcane Armor: no Str requirement, spellcasting focus, covers body, replaces missing limbs, can't be removed against will. Armor counts as separate items (chest, boots, helmet, weapon) for infusions.

name: Defensive Field (Armorer)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; temp HP = artificer level
summary: As a bonus action, gain temp HP equal to artificer level (replacing existing temp HP). Lost if you doff armor.

name: Guardian (Armorer L15)
trigger: When a Huge or smaller creature ends its turn within 30 ft
summary: Use reaction to pull a creature up to 25 ft. If pulled within 5 ft, make a melee weapon attack as part of the reaction.

name: Experimental Elixir (Alchemist)
resourceCostSummary: 1 free elixir per long rest; additional cost 1st+ spell slots
rechargeSummary: 1 free per long rest; expend spell slots for more
summary: At end of long rest, create 1 random experimental elixir. Roll on table for effect: Healing (2d4+Int HP), Swiftness (+10 speed 1 hr), Resilience (+1 AC 10 min), Boldness (bless-like 1 min), Flight (fly 10 ft 10 min), Transformation (alter self 10 min). As an action, a creature can drink or administer it.

name: Alchemical Savant (Alchemist)
summary: When casting a spell using alchemist's supplies as focus, add Intelligence modifier (min +1) to one healing roll or one acid/fire/necrotic/poison damage roll.

name: Eldritch Cannon (Artillerist)
resourceCostSummary: 1 free cannon per long rest; additional cost a spell slot of 1st+
scalingSummary: Damage: 2d8 at L3, 3d8 at L9; Flamethrower (15-ft cone, Dex save half), Force Ballista (120 ft spell attack + push 5 ft), Protector (THP to allies within 10 ft)
summary: As an action, summon a Small or Tiny eldritch cannon (Flamethrower, Force Ballista, or Protector) within 5 ft for 1 hour. As a bonus action, activate it. At L15 create two at once.

name: Steel Defender (Battle Smith)
scalingSummary: Stats scale with PB; HP = 2 + Int + 5×artificer level
summary: Gain a steel defender construct companion. In combat, it shares your initiative and auto-dodges. As a bonus action, command it to take another action (Attack, Dash, Disengage, Help, Hide, Search). Can use reaction to impose disadvantage on attacks against nearby allies (Deflect Attack).

name: Arcane Jolt (Battle Smith)
trigger: When you hit with a magic weapon attack or your steel defender hits
scalingSummary: Uses = Intelligence modifier (min 1); 2d6 force at L9, 4d6 at L15 (or heal ally for same amount)
summary: Deal extra 2d6 force damage or heal a creature/object within 30 ft for the same amount. Scales to 4d6 at L15.

name: Rage
scalingSummary: 2 uses at L1, 3 at L3, 4 at L6, 5 at L12, 6 at L17; damage bonus: +2 at L1, +3 at L9, +4 at L16
summary: As a bonus action, enter a rage for up to 1 minute. Advantage on Strength checks and saves, bonus melee weapon damage (+2 to +4), resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage. Cannot cast spells or concentrate while raging. Ends early if no attack made or damage taken in a round.

name: Unarmored Defense (Barbarian)
summary: While not wearing armor, AC = 10 + Dexterity modifier + Constitution modifier. Can use a shield and still benefit.

name: Reckless Attack
summary: When making your first attack on your turn, choose to attack with advantage on all melee weapon Strength attacks this turn. Attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

name: Danger Sense
summary: Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects you can see (traps, spells). Must not be blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

name: Extra Attack
summary: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

name: Fast Movement
summary: +10 ft speed while not wearing heavy armor.

name: Feral Instinct
summary: Advantage on initiative rolls. Can act normally on first turn of combat even if surprised, provided you enter rage first.

name: Brutal Critical
scalingSummary: 1 extra weapon die on crit at L9, 2 at L13, 3 at L17
summary: Roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit. Increases at higher levels.

name: Relentless Rage
trigger: When dropped to 0 HP while raging and not killed outright
scalingSummary: Con save DC 10, increases by 5 each success until short/long rest resets it
summary: When dropping to 0 HP while raging, make DC 10 Constitution save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each time you succeed until a rest resets it.

name: Persistent Rage
summary: Rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it. Normal early-end conditions (no attack/damage) no longer apply.

name: Indomitable Might
summary: If total Strength check is less than Strength score, can use Strength score instead.

name: Primal Champion
summary: Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 24.

name: Frenzy (Berserker)
resourceCostSummary: No additional resource, but grants bonus-action attacks while raging
summary: While raging, can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each turn. Suffer one level of exhaustion when rage ends.

name: Mindless Rage (Berserker)
summary: Cannot be charmed or frightened while raging. Any such effects are suspended for the duration of rage.

name: Intimidating Presence (Berserker)
summary: As an action, choose a creature within 30 ft. Wis save vs (8+PB+Cha) or be frightened until end of your next turn. Can repeat action on subsequent turns to extend.

name: Retaliation (Berserker)
trigger: When taking damage from a creature within 5 ft
summary: Use reaction to make a melee weapon attack against the creature that damaged you.

name: Totem Spirit: Bear (Totem Warrior)
summary: While raging, resistance to all damage except psychic.

name: Totem Spirit: Eagle (Totem Warrior)
summary: While raging, opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage. Can Dash as a bonus action.

name: Ancestral Protectors (Ancestral Guardian)
trigger: First creature hit on your turn while raging
summary: While raging, first creature you hit on your turn has disadvantage on attacks against anyone but you, and allies hit by that creature have resistance to its damage until start of your next turn.

name: Spirit Shield (Ancestral Guardian)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft takes damage while you are raging
scalingSummary: Damage reduction: 2d6 at L6, 3d6 at L10, 4d6 at L14
summary: Use reaction to reduce the damage by rolling 2d6 (scaling to 4d6).

name: Vengeful Ancestors (Ancestral Guardian)
trigger: When using Spirit Shield to reduce damage
summary: When Spirit Shield reduces damage, the attacker takes force damage equal to the amount prevented.

name: Storm Aura (Storm Herald)
resourceCostSummary: Activates when entering rage; can reactivate as bonus action
scalingSummary: Damage/THP scales by barbarian level
summary: When entering rage, aura activates with chosen environment (Desert: fire damage to all in aura; Sea: Dex save or lightning damage to one; Tundra: temp HP to allies in aura). Reactivate as bonus action each turn.

name: Divine Fury (Zealot)
trigger: First creature hit on your turn while raging
scalingSummary: 1d6 + half barbarian level (necrotic or radiant)
summary: While raging, the first creature you hit each turn takes extra 1d6 + half barbarian level necrotic or radiant damage.

name: Fanatical Focus (Zealot)
trigger: When failing a saving throw while raging
summary: Reroll a failed saving throw while raging. Must use new roll. Once per rage.

name: Zealous Presence (Zealot)
summary: As a bonus action, unleash a battle cry. Up to 10 allies within 60 ft gain advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until your next turn.

name: Rage beyond Death (Zealot)
summary: While raging, 0 HP doesn't knock you unconscious. Still make death saves; 3 failures still kill you. You die if your rage ends and you still have 0 HP.

name: Form of the Beast (Beast)
trigger: When entering rage
summary: When raging, manifest a natural weapon: Bite (1d8 piercing + Con mod heal if below half HP, once per turn), Claws (1d6 slashing + one extra claw attack as part of Attack action), Tail (1d8 piercing, reach, reaction +1d8 AC vs melee hit).

name: Infectious Fury (Beast)
trigger: When hitting with natural weapons while raging
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: Target must make Wis save or either use its reaction to attack another creature of your choice, or take 2d12 psychic damage.

name: Magic Awareness (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: As an action, sense the location of spells and magic items within 60 ft not behind total cover, and learn the school of any spell sensed.

name: Wild Surge (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
trigger: When entering rage
summary: When entering rage, roll on Wild Magic table for a random effect. Options include: damage aura, teleportation, summon flumph, AC bonus, etc. If effect requires a save, DC = 8+PB+Con.

name: Bolstering Magic (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: As an action, touch a creature to grant either a d3 bonus to attack rolls and ability checks for 10 minutes, or recover one spell slot of up to 3rd level.

name: Unstable Backlash (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
trigger: When taking damage or failing a saving throw while raging
summary: Use reaction to roll on the Wild Magic table and replace your current Wild Magic effect with the new one.

name: Battlerager Armor (Battlerager)
summary: While raging and wearing spiked armor, use bonus action to make a melee attack with armor spikes (1d4 piercing + Str + rage bonus).

name: Battlerager Charge (Battlerager)
summary: While raging, can Dash as a bonus action.

name: Spiked Retribution (Battlerager)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft hits you with a melee attack while you are raging and wearing spiked armor
summary: Attacker takes 3 piercing damage.

name: Bardic Inspiration
rechargeSummary: Long rest (short rest at L5 via Font of Inspiration)
scalingSummary: Uses = Charisma modifier (min 1); die size: d6 at L1, d8 at L5, d10 at L10, d12 at L15
summary: As a bonus action, grant one creature within 60 ft a Bardic Inspiration die. Within 10 minutes, recipient can roll the die and add to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw after seeing the d20 but before the DM says the result.

name: Jack of All Trades
scalingSummary: Half proficiency bonus (rounded down)
summary: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus. Also applies to initiative (Dexterity check).

name: Song of Rest
scalingSummary: Extra healing die: d6 at L2, d8 at L9, d10 at L13, d12 at L17
summary: During a short rest, any creature that spends Hit Dice regains an extra 1d6 HP (scaling to d12 at higher levels).

name: Expertise (Bard)
scalingSummary: 2 skills at L3, 2 more at L10
summary: Choose two skill proficiencies to double your proficiency bonus. Two additional skills at L10.

name: Font of Inspiration
rechargeSummary: Changes Bardic Inspiration recharge to short or long rest
summary: Bardic Inspiration uses now recharge on a short rest instead of only a long rest.

name: Countercharm
summary: As an action, begin a performance that lasts until end of next turn. Allies within 30 ft have advantage on saves against being frightened or charmed.

name: Magical Secrets
scalingSummary: 2 spells at L10, 2 at L14, 2 at L18
summary: Learn two spells from any class at levels 10, 14, and 18. These count as bard spells.

name: Superior Inspiration
trigger: When rolling initiative with no Bardic Inspiration uses remaining
summary: Regain one use of Bardic Inspiration when rolling initiative with none left.

name: Cutting Words (College of Lore)
trigger: When a creature within 60 ft makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Subtract BI die roll from the creature's roll
summary: Expend a Bardic Inspiration use as a reaction to subtract the BI die roll from a creature's attack roll, ability check, or damage roll.

name: Peerless Skill (College of Lore)
trigger: When making an ability check (after rolling but before DM result)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: Add a Bardic Inspiration die to your own ability check. Can use after seeing the d20 roll.

name: Combat Inspiration (College of Valor)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: A creature with your Bardic Inspiration die can roll it and add to a weapon damage roll, or use its reaction to add the die to its AC against one attack.

name: Battle Magic (College of Valor)
trigger: When using action to cast a bard spell
summary: When you use your action to cast a bard spell, make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

name: Performance of Creation (College of Creation)
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or expend a 2nd+ level spell slot)
scalingSummary: Item size/GP value scales with bard level
summary: As an action, create one nonmagical item within 10 ft. Item value and size scale with bard level. Duration = PB hours.

name: Animating Performance (College of Creation)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action, animate a nonmagical item within 30 ft as a Dancing Item for 1 hour. Item can attack (PB + Cha to hit, 1d10 + PB force) and can use your BA to Dash, Disengage, etc.

name: Mantle of Inspiration (College of Glamour)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action, expend a BI use to grant up to Charisma modifier creatures within 60 ft temp HP equal to BI die + Cha. Each can use reaction to move up to speed without provoking OAs.

name: Mantle of Majesty (College of Glamour)
summary: As a bonus action, cast command without a spell slot and take on an unearthly appearance for 1 minute (concentration). Can recast command as a bonus action each turn during this time.

name: Unbreakable Majesty (College of Glamour)
summary: As a bonus action, assume a majestic presence for 1 minute. Any creature trying to attack you for the first time each turn makes Charisma save or must choose a new target or waste the attack.

name: Blade Flourish (College of Swords)
trigger: When taking the Attack action and hitting with a weapon attack
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: When hitting with a weapon attack during Attack action, can use a BI die for: Defensive (+die to AC), Slashing (+die damage to target and another within 5 ft), or Mobile (+die damage, push target 5+die ft, follow).

name: Master's Flourish (College of Swords)
summary: When using a Blade Flourish, can roll a d6 instead of expending a Bardic Inspiration die.

name: Psychic Blades (College of Whispers)
trigger: When hitting a creature with a weapon attack (once per round on your turn)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage: 2d6 at L3, 3d6 at L5, 5d6 at L10, 8d6 at L15
summary: Expend a BI use to deal extra psychic damage on a weapon hit. Scales to 8d6 at L15.

name: Unsettling Words (College of Eloquence)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action, expend a BI die and subtract the roll from the next saving throw a creature within 60 ft makes before your next turn.

name: Infectious Inspiration (College of Eloquence)
trigger: When a creature within 60 ft succeeds using one of your Bardic Inspiration dice
resourceCostSummary: Grants a free BI die to another creature
summary: Use reaction to give a Bardic Inspiration die (without expending a use) to another creature that can hear you within 60 ft.

name: Tales from Beyond (College of Spirits)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action while holding Spiritual Focus, expend a BI use to roll on the Spirit Tales table and produce a random story effect (healing, damage, buff, etc.). Tale can be bestowed as an action or bonus action.

name: Spellcasting (Cleric)
scalingSummary: Full caster; prepared (Wisdom); domain spells always prepared
summary: Prepare cleric spells using Wisdom. Full caster progression. 3 cantrips at L1. Prepared casters have access to full class list up to their max spell level, selecting which to prepare each day.

name: Channel Divinity
scalingSummary: 1 use at L2, 2 at L6, 3 at L18
summary: Channel divine power for domain-specific effects. Base option: Turn Undead (action, each undead within 30 ft makes Wis save or be turned for 1 minute or until damaged). Each domain grants additional CD options.

name: Destroy Undead
trigger: When turning undead (rider on Turn Undead CD)
resourceCostSummary: Rides on Turn Undead (no additional CD cost)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: CR thresholds: 1/2 at L5, 1 at L8, 2 at L11, 3 at L14, 4 at L17
summary: When using Turn Undead, undead of CR at or below the threshold that fail their save are destroyed instead of turned.

name: Divine Intervention
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (recharges only on success, or after 7 days)
rechargeSummary: 7 days on failure; immediate on success
scalingSummary: d100 roll: need ≤ cleric level to succeed; L20 auto-succeeds
summary: As an action, call on your deity. Roll percentile dice: if result ≤ cleric level, the deity intervenes (DM adjudicates effect). On success, can't use again for 7 days. At L20, auto-succeeds once per week.

name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life (Life Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Restore HP = 5 × cleric level, distributed among creatures within 30 ft (max half their HP)
summary: As an action, restore HP equal to 5× cleric level, divided among chosen creatures within 30 ft. Cannot heal a creature above half its max HP.

name: Warding Flare (Light Domain)
trigger: When attacked by a creature within 30 ft that you can see
scalingSummary: Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1)
summary: Impose disadvantage on the attack roll. Attacker must not be immune to being blinded. At L6, can use on attacks against allies within 30 ft.

name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn (Light Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage = 2d10 + cleric level
summary: As an action, dispel magical darkness within 30 ft. Each hostile creature within 30 ft makes Con save or takes 2d10 + cleric level radiant damage (half on success).

name: Corona of Light (Light Domain)
summary: Activate a 60-ft bright/30-ft dim sunlight aura for 1 minute. Enemies in the bright light have disadvantage on saves vs fire or radiant damage spells.

name: Wrath of the Storm (Tempest Domain)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft hits you with an attack
scalingSummary: Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1); damage 2d8 lightning or thunder
summary: Use reaction to deal 2d8 lightning or thunder damage; Dex save for half.

name: Channel Divinity: Destructive Wrath (Tempest Domain)
trigger: When rolling lightning or thunder damage
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
summary: Use CD to deal maximum damage instead of rolling for lightning or thunder damage.

name: War Priest (War Domain)
trigger: When taking the Attack action
scalingSummary: Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1)
summary: After taking the Attack action, make one weapon attack as a bonus action. Limited uses per long rest.

name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike (War Domain)
trigger: When making an attack roll (after seeing the roll)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
summary: Gain +10 to an attack roll after seeing the d20 but before DM says hit/miss.

name: Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing (War Domain)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft makes an attack roll (after seeing the roll)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
summary: Use reaction to grant +10 to an ally's attack roll after seeing the d20 but before DM result.

name: Channel Divinity: Touch of Death (Death Domain)
trigger: When hitting a creature with a melee attack
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Necrotic damage = 5 + (2 × cleric level)
summary: Use CD to deal extra necrotic damage equal to 5 + (2 × cleric level) on a melee hit.

name: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary (Twilight Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action, create a 30-ft-radius sphere of dim light for 1 minute. At end of each turn of a creature in the sphere, choose to grant that creature 1d6+cleric level temp HP or end one charmed/frightened condition.

name: Steps of Night (Twilight Domain)
trigger: When in dim light or darkness
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: As a bonus action, gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 minute while in dim light or darkness.

name: Voice of Authority (Order Domain)
trigger: When casting a spell of 1st+ level that targets an ally
summary: After casting a leveled spell targeting an ally, that ally can use its reaction to make one weapon attack against a creature of your choice.

name: Blessing of the Forge (Forge Domain)
rechargeSummary: At end of long rest (choose new item)
summary: At end of each long rest, touch one nonmagical armor or weapon to make it +1 until your next long rest.

name: Channel Divinity: Path to the Grave (Grave Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action, curse a creature within 30 ft. The next time an ally hits it before end of your next turn, the creature has vulnerability to all of that attack's damage.

name: Sentinel at Death's Door (Grave Domain)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft suffers a critical hit
scalingSummary: Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1)
summary: Use reaction to turn a critical hit against an ally within 30 ft into a normal hit.

name: Emboldening Bond (Peace Domain)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; targets scale; duration 10 minutes
summary: As an action, bond PB creatures within 30 ft for 10 minutes. While bonded and within 30 ft, a creature can add 1d4 to an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw once per turn.

name: Protective Bond (Peace Domain)
trigger: When a bonded creature is about to take damage
summary: Another bonded creature within 30 ft can use its reaction to teleport to the damaged creature and take the damage in its place.

name: Wild Shape
scalingSummary: 2 uses per rest at L2. CR limits: CR 1/4 (no fly/swim) at L2, CR 1/2 (no fly) at L4, CR 1 at L8. Swim speed at L4, fly speed at L8. Unlimited uses at L20 (Archdruid).
summary: As an action, assume the form of a beast you've seen before. Gain the beast's physical stats, HP as temp buffer, and retain your mental stats. Cannot cast spells in beast form (until Beast Spells at L18). Duration: hours equal to half druid level.

name: Spellcasting (Druid)
resourceCostSummary: Expends a spell slot of the spell's level or higher
scalingSummary: Full caster progression; prepared caster (Wisdom-based)
summary: Prepare and cast druid spells using Wisdom. Full caster slot progression. Cantrips: 2 at L1, 3 at L4, 4 at L10.

name: Beast Spells
summary: Can cast many druid spells while in Wild Shape form (verbal and somatic components become available, material components still required).

name: Natural Recovery (Circle of the Land)
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost; recovers spell slots
rechargeSummary: Once per long rest; used during a short rest
scalingSummary: Recover combined spell levels equal to half druid level (rounded up), max 5th-level slots
summary: During a short rest, recover expended spell slots totaling up to half your druid level (rounded up). No slot recovered can be 6th level or higher.

name: Combat Wild Shape (Circle of the Moon)
rechargeSummary: Wild Shape recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Healing: expend spell slot as bonus action for 1d8 per spell level while in beast form
summary: Wild Shape activation changes from action to bonus action. While in Wild Shape, can use bonus action to expend a spell slot to heal 1d8 per spell slot level.

name: Circle Forms (Circle of the Moon)
scalingSummary: CR 1 at L2, CR 2 at L6 (druid level ÷ 3), CR 3 at L9, CR 4 at L12, CR 5 at L15, CR 6 at L18
summary: Wild Shape CR limit increases to 1 (ignoring usual restriction) and scales to druid level ÷ 3 at higher levels.

name: Elemental Wild Shape (Circle of the Moon)
rechargeSummary: Wild Shape recharges on short or long rest
summary: Expend two uses of Wild Shape to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

name: Balm of the Summer Court (Circle of Dreams)
resourceCostSummary: Spend any number of dice from the pool
scalingSummary: Dice pool = druid level; each die is d6
summary: As a bonus action, choose a creature within 120 ft and spend any number of Balm dice up to half your druid level. Target regains HP equal to the rolled total. Also grants 1 temp HP per die spent.

name: Hidden Paths (Circle of Dreams)
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or expend a spell slot to use again)
summary: As a bonus action, teleport up to 60 ft to an unoccupied space you can see. Alternatively, use an action to teleport a willing creature you touch up to 30 ft.

name: Spirit Totem (Circle of the Shepherd)
summary: Summon a spirit totem to a point within 60 ft for 1 minute. Choose Bear (temp HP + advantage on Str checks/saves), Hawk (reaction to grant advantage on attack), or Unicorn (bonus healing on spell casts). Moveable as bonus action.

name: Faithful Summons (Circle of the Shepherd)
trigger: When reduced to 0 HP or incapacitated against your will
summary: Immediately gain the benefits of conjure animals cast at 9th level. The conjured beasts protect you and attack your foes if given no commands.

name: Halo of Spores (Circle of Spores)
trigger: When a creature moves within 10 ft of you or starts its turn there
scalingSummary: Damage: 1d4 at L2, 1d6 at L6, 1d8 at L10, 1d10 at L14; necrotic; Con save for none
summary: Use reaction to deal scaling necrotic damage to a creature within 10 ft; Con save negates.

name: Symbiotic Entity (Circle of Spores)
resourceCostSummary: 1 Wild Shape use (does not transform into a beast)
rechargeSummary: Wild Shape recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Temp HP = 4 × druid level; extra melee damage = 1d6 poison
summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to awaken spores instead of transforming. Gain 4×druid level temp HP. While active: Halo of Spores damage doubles, melee weapon attacks deal extra 1d6 poison. Lasts 10 minutes or until temp HP is lost.

name: Fungal Infestation (Circle of Spores)
trigger: When a Small or Medium beast or humanoid dies within 10 ft of you
summary: Use reaction to animate the corpse as a zombie with 1 HP. It takes its turn immediately after yours and lasts 1 hour. Only one fungal zombie at a time.

name: Spreading Spores (Circle of Spores)
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost (requires Symbiotic Entity active)
summary: While Symbiotic Entity is active, hurl spores up to 30 ft creating a 10-ft cube. Halo of Spores damage applies to any creature entering or starting turn there for 1 minute.

name: Fungal Body (Circle of Spores)
summary: Cannot be blinded, deafened, frightened, or poisoned. Critical hits against you become normal hits unless incapacitated.

name: Starry Form (Circle of Stars)
rechargeSummary: Wild Shape recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Duration 10 minutes; constellation effects scale at L10 (2d8 for Archer/Chalice, fly 20 ft for Dragon)
summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to take on a starry form. Choose Archer (bonus action ranged spell attack 1d8+Wis radiant), Chalice (bonus 1d8+Wis healing when casting healing spells), or Dragon (treat Int/Wis checks and Con saves for concentration as min 10 on d20).

name: Cosmic Omen (Circle of Stars)
trigger: When a creature you can see within 30 ft makes an attack roll, saving throw, or ability check
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or expend a spell slot to use again)
scalingSummary: Gain either Weal (1d6 bonus) or Woe (1d6 penalty) after each long rest
summary: After each long rest, roll a die: on even, gain Weal (use reaction to add 1d6 to a roll); on odd, gain Woe (use reaction to subtract 1d6 from an enemy's roll).

name: Summon Wildfire Spirit (Circle of Wildfire)
rechargeSummary: Wild Shape recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Spirit stats scale with PB
summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to summon a wildfire spirit. Creatures within 10 ft (except you) make Dex save or take 2d6 fire damage. Spirit acts in combat and can use Flame Seed (ranged spell attack) or Fiery Teleportation (teleport allies, damage enemies).

name: Cauterizing Flames (Circle of Wildfire)
trigger: When a Small or larger creature dies within 30 ft of you or your wildfire spirit
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: When a creature dies nearby, a spectral flame appears in its space for 1 minute. When a creature enters or starts turn there: either heal 2d10+Wis or take 2d10+Wis fire damage (Dex save half).

name: Blazing Revival (Circle of Wildfire)
trigger: When reduced to 0 HP while wildfire spirit is within 120 ft
summary: If your wildfire spirit is within 120 ft when you drop to 0 HP, you can cause the spirit to drop to 0 HP instead. You regain half your max HP and immediately rise to your feet.

name: Fighting Style
summary: Choose one Fighting Style option that provides a persistent combat bonus. Champion subclass gains a second style at L10.

name: Second Wind
scalingSummary: Healing = 1d10 + fighter level
summary: Use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.

name: Action Surge
scalingSummary: 1 use at L2, 2 uses at L17
summary: On your turn, take one additional action. Does not grant additional bonus actions.

name: Extra Attack
scalingSummary: 2 attacks at L5, 3 at L11, 4 at L20
summary: Attack multiple times when taking the Attack action. Scales to 3 attacks at L11 and 4 at L20.

name: Indomitable
trigger: When you fail a saving throw
scalingSummary: 1 use at L9, 2 at L13, 3 at L17
summary: Reroll a failed saving throw. Must use the new roll.

name: Improved Critical (Champion)
scalingSummary: Crit on 19-20 at L3, 18-20 at L15
summary: Weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. At L15 (Superior Critical), expands to 18-20.

name: Remarkable Athlete (Champion)
summary: Add half proficiency bonus (round up) to any Str/Dex/Con check that doesn't already use proficiency. Running long jump distance increases by Str modifier in feet.

name: Survivor (Champion)
trigger: At the start of each of your turns when you are at or below half HP and above 0 HP
summary: Regain 5 + Constitution modifier HP at the start of each turn if you have no more than half your HP and are above 0.

name: Combat Superiority (Battle Master)
scalingSummary: 4 dice at L3 (d8), 5 dice at L7 (d10 at L10, d12 at L18), 6 dice at L15; regain 1 on initiative if none left (L15 Relentless)
summary: Learn and use combat maneuvers powered by superiority dice. Each maneuver typically rides on a weapon attack and adds the superiority die to damage plus an additional effect (trip, disarm, riposte, etc.).

name: Know Your Enemy (Battle Master)
summary: Spend 1 minute observing a creature outside combat to learn if it is your equal, superior, or inferior in two of: Str score, Dex score, Con score, AC, current HP, total class levels, fighter class levels.

name: Weapon Bond (Eldritch Knight)
scalingSummary: Can bond up to 2 weapons
summary: Perform a 1-hour ritual to bond with a weapon. Bonded weapon cannot be disarmed unless incapacitated, and can be summoned to hand as a bonus action if on the same plane.

name: War Magic (Eldritch Knight)
trigger: When you use your action to cast a cantrip
scalingSummary: Improves at L18 to work with any spell
summary: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action. At L18 (Improved War Magic), this extends to casting any spell.

name: Eldritch Strike (Eldritch Knight)
trigger: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack
summary: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it has disadvantage on the next saving throw against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.

name: Arcane Charge (Eldritch Knight)
trigger: When you use your Action Surge
summary: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see, before or after the additional action.

name: Arcane Shot (Arcane Archer)
trigger: Once per turn when you fire an arrow from a shortbow or longbow as part of the Attack action
scalingSummary: 2 uses at L3; regain 1 on initiative if none left (L15 Ever-Ready Shot)
summary: Apply a magical Arcane Shot option to an arrow as part of the Attack action. Options include effects like bursting, seeking, beguiling, or banishing arrows. Each option has a specific saving throw and magical effect.

name: Curving Shot (Arcane Archer)
trigger: When you make an attack roll with a magic arrow and miss
summary: Use a bonus action to reroll a missed magic arrow attack against a different target within 60 ft of the original target.

name: Unwavering Mark (Cavalier)
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost, but limited to Strength modifier uses (min 1) for the special bonus attack
rechargeSummary: Long rest (for the special bonus attack)
summary: Mark a creature you hit. Marked creatures have disadvantage on attacks against anyone other than you. If a marked creature damages someone else, you can make a special bonus action attack with advantage that deals extra damage equal to half fighter level on your next turn.

name: Warding Maneuver (Cavalier)
trigger: When you or a creature within 5 ft is hit by an attack
scalingSummary: Uses = Constitution modifier (min 1); d8 roll increases to d10 at L10, d12 at L18
summary: Roll 1d8 and add it to the target's AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss. Must be wielding a melee weapon or shield.

name: Hold the Line (Cavalier)
summary: Creatures provoke opportunity attacks when they move 5 ft or more within your reach (not just when leaving). If you hit with an OA, target's speed becomes 0 for the rest of the turn.

name: Ferocious Charger (Cavalier)
trigger: When you hit a creature after moving at least 10 ft straight toward it
summary: If you move at least 10 ft straight before hitting a creature, it must make Strength save or be knocked prone. Once per turn.

name: Vigilant Defender (Cavalier)
summary: Gain a special reaction on every creature's turn (except your own) that can only be used for opportunity attacks. This is in addition to your normal reaction.

name: Fighting Spirit (Samurai)
rechargeSummary: Long rest; regain 1 on initiative if none left (L10 Tireless Spirit)
scalingSummary: 3 uses at L3; temp HP: 5 at L3, 10 at L10, 15 at L15
summary: As a bonus action, gain advantage on all weapon attack rolls until end of current turn. Also gain temporary HP (5/10/15 scaling by level).

name: Rapid Strike (Samurai)
trigger: When you have advantage on a weapon attack roll and take the Attack action
summary: If you have advantage on an attack, you can forgo that advantage to make an additional weapon attack against the same target. Once per turn.

name: Strength before Death (Samurai)
trigger: When you take damage that reduces you to 0 HP and doesn't kill you outright
summary: Use your reaction to delay falling unconscious and immediately take an extra turn, interrupting the current turn. Normal death save rules apply during the extra turn.

name: Psionic Strike (Psi Warrior)
trigger: Once per turn, immediately after hitting a target within 30 ft and dealing weapon damage
rechargeSummary: Long rest (all dice); 1 on short rest (L15)
scalingSummary: Dice: 2×PB d6 at L3, d8 at L5, d10 at L11, d12 at L17
summary: Expend one Psionic Energy die to deal force damage equal to die roll + Intelligence modifier to the target.

name: Protective Field (Psi Warrior)
trigger: When you or another creature within 30 ft takes damage
scalingSummary: Die scales: d6 at L3, d8 at L5, d10 at L11, d12 at L17
summary: Use reaction to reduce damage taken by die roll + Intelligence modifier (min 1 reduction).

name: Telekinetic Movement (Psi Warrior)
resourceCostSummary: 1 Psionic Energy die (free once per short/long rest)
rechargeSummary: One free use per short/long rest; additional uses cost dice
summary: Move one loose Large or smaller object or one willing creature (not self) up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Psi-Powered Leap (Psi Warrior)
resourceCostSummary: Free once per short/long rest; then 1 Psionic Energy die per use
summary: As a bonus action, gain a flying speed equal to twice your walking speed until end of current turn.

name: Bulwark of Force (Psi Warrior)
summary: As a bonus action, grant half cover (+2 AC, +2 Dex saves) to up to Int modifier creatures (including self) within 30 ft for 1 minute.

name: Telekinetic Master (Psi Warrior)
resourceCostSummary: Cast telekinesis without components; free once per long rest; then 1 Psionic Energy die to cast again
rechargeSummary: One free cast per long rest; additional casts cost dice
summary: Cast telekinesis with no components (spellcasting ability: Intelligence). While concentrating on it, can make one weapon attack as a bonus action each turn.

name: Giant's Might (Rune Knight)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; extra damage: 1d6 at L3, 1d8 at L10, 1d10 at L18; size Huge at L18
summary: As a bonus action, become Large (if smaller) for 1 minute. Advantage on Strength checks/saves. Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage on a weapon attack. Size increases to Huge at L18.

name: Runic Shield (Rune Knight)
trigger: When another creature within 60 ft is hit by an attack roll
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: Use reaction to force the attacker to reroll the d20 and use the new roll.

name: Manifest Echo (Echo Fighter)
rechargeSummary: No limit; can re-manifest at will
summary: As a bonus action, manifest a translucent echo in an unoccupied space within 15 ft. Echo has AC 14+PB, 1 HP, immunity to conditions. Can swap places with echo using 15 ft of movement.

name: Unleash Incarnation (Echo Fighter)
trigger: When you take the Attack action
scalingSummary: Uses = Constitution modifier (min 1)
summary: When you take the Attack action, make one additional melee attack from the echo's position.

name: Shadow Martyr (Echo Fighter)
trigger: Before an attack roll is made against an ally you can see
summary: Use reaction to teleport echo to within 5 ft of targeted ally. The attack is made against the echo instead. Once per short/long rest.

name: Unarmored Defense
summary: While wearing no armor and not using a shield, AC = 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier.

name: Martial Arts
scalingSummary: Martial Arts die: d4 at L1, d6 at L5, d8 at L11, d10 at L17
summary: Use Dexterity instead of Strength for unarmed strikes and monk weapons. Unarmed strikes and monk weapons use Martial Arts die for damage. Can make one unarmed strike as a bonus action when taking the Attack action with an unarmed strike or monk weapon.

name: Ki
resourceCostSummary: Varies by technique (1 ki for Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind; 1 for Stunning Strike; etc.)
scalingSummary: Ki points = monk level (2 at L2, scaling to 20 at L20)
summary: Gain a pool of ki points fueling monk techniques. Flurry of Blows (bonus action, 2 unarmed strikes after Attack), Patient Defense (bonus action Dodge), Step of the Wind (bonus action Dash or Disengage, double jump distance).

name: Unarmored Movement
scalingSummary: +10 ft at L2, +15 at L6, +20 at L10, +25 at L14, +30 at L18; wall/water running at L9
summary: Speed increases while unarmored and not using a shield. At L9, can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids on your turn without falling.

name: Deflect Missiles
trigger: When hit by a ranged weapon attack
resourceCostSummary: No ki cost to reduce damage; 1 ki to throw the missile back
scalingSummary: Damage reduction = 1d10 + Dexterity modifier + monk level
summary: Use reaction to reduce damage from a ranged weapon attack by 1d10 + Dex mod + monk level. If damage reduced to 0, can spend 1 ki to catch and throw it back as a monk weapon (ranged attack, 20/60 ft).

name: Slow Fall
trigger: When falling
scalingSummary: Reduce falling damage by 5 × monk level
summary: Use reaction to reduce falling damage by 5 × monk level.

name: Extra Attack
summary: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

name: Stunning Strike
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki to force the target to make a Constitution save or be stunned until the end of your next turn.

name: Evasion
summary: Dexterity saves for half damage: take no damage on success, half on failure.

name: Stillness of Mind
summary: Use your action to end one effect on yourself causing you to be charmed or frightened.

name: Diamond Soul
summary: Gain proficiency in all saving throws. Can spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save (must take new roll).

name: Empty Body
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: Spend 4 ki as an action to become invisible for 1 minute. Also gain resistance to all damage but force. Additionally, can cast astral projection on self only (no ki cost).

name: Perfect Self
trigger: When rolling initiative and having 0 ki points
summary: When you roll initiative and have no ki points remaining, regain 4 ki points.

name: Open Hand Technique (Way of the Open Hand)
trigger: When hitting with a Flurry of Blows attack
resourceCostSummary: Ki already spent for Flurry of Blows
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: When hitting with Flurry of Blows, impose one effect: Dex save or prone, Str save or pushed 15 ft, or target can't take reactions until end of your next turn.

name: Quivering Palm (Way of the Open Hand)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: Spend 3 ki to set up lethal vibrations in a creature you hit. Can end the vibrations as an action: target makes Con save or drops to 0 HP; on success, takes 10d10 necrotic damage.

name: Shadow Arts (Way of the Shadow)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: Spend 2 ki to cast darkness, darkvision, pass without trace, or silence, without material components. Also learn the minor illusion cantrip.

name: Shadow Step (Way of the Shadow)
summary: As a bonus action, teleport up to 60 ft from one dim light/darkness area to another. First melee attack after teleport has advantage.

name: Opportunist (Way of the Shadow)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft is hit by an attack from someone other than you
summary: Use reaction to make a melee attack against that creature.

name: Hand of Healing (Way of Mercy)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Healing = Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier
summary: Spend 1 ki to touch a creature and restore HP equal to Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier. Can replace one Flurry of Blows attack with this at no additional ki cost.

name: Hand of Harm (Way of Mercy)
trigger: When hitting with an unarmed strike (expends ki)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage = Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier; cannot be reduced
summary: When you hit with an unarmed strike, spend 1 ki to deal extra necrotic damage equal to one roll of your Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier.

name: Arms of the Astral Self (Way of the Astral Self)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: Spend 1 ki as a bonus action to summon spectral arms for 10 minutes. Arms have 10 ft reach, use Wisdom for attack/damage, deal force or necrotic damage.

name: Redirect Attack (Drunken Master)
trigger: When a creature misses you with a melee attack
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
summary: Spend 1 ki as a reaction to redirect the missed attack to another creature within 5 ft of you.

name: Kensei's Shot (Kensei)
scalingSummary: Damage bonus: 1d4 at L3, 1d6 at L11, 1d8 at L17
summary: As a bonus action, add 1d4 bonus damage to ranged attacks with kensei weapons until end of turn.

name: Radiant Sun Bolt (Sun Soul)
scalingSummary: Damage = Martial Arts die (radiant); 30 ft range
summary: Make a ranged spell attack (30 ft) dealing radiant damage equal to your Martial Arts die. Can replace any Attack-action attack with this, and can use as a bonus action (as with unarmed strikes).

name: Searing Sunburst (Sun Soul)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: 2d6 radiant per ki spent (max 3 ki = 6d6)
summary: As an action, create a burst of light at a point within 150 ft. Each creature in a 20-ft radius makes Con save or takes 2d6 radiant damage per ki point spent (up to 3 ki).

name: Hour of Reaping (Way of Long Death)
summary: As an action, each creature within 30 ft that can see you makes Wisdom save or be frightened until end of your next turn.

name: Mastery of Death (Way of Long Death)
trigger: When reduced to 0 HP and not killed outright
summary: When reduced to 0 HP, spend 1 ki to drop to 1 HP instead.

name: Breath of the Dragon (Ascendant Dragon)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage = 2 rolls of Martial Arts die
summary: When taking the Attack action, replace one attack with a breath weapon (20-ft cone or 30-ft line). Creatures make Dex save or take damage equal to 2 Martial Arts die rolls.

name: Wings Unfurled (Ascendant Dragon)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: When using Step of the Wind, spectral wings grant fly speed equal to walking speed until end of turn.

name: Divine Sense
scalingSummary: Uses per long rest: 1 + Charisma modifier
summary: As an action, detect the location and type of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet not behind total cover, and detect any consecrated or desecrated place or object within the same range.

name: Lay on Hands
resourceCostSummary: Player chooses how many points to spend (up to pool maximum)
scalingSummary: Pool size = paladin level × 5 hit points
summary: Spend points from the pool to heal a creature by touch; alternatively spend 5 points to cure one disease or neutralize one poison affecting the target.

name: Fighting Style
summary: Choose one Fighting Style option that provides a persistent bonus (e.g., Defense +1 AC, Dueling +2 damage, Great Weapon Fighting reroll, Protection reaction). The choice is permanent once made.

name: Spellcasting (Paladin)
resourceCostSummary: Expends a spell slot of the spell's level or higher
scalingSummary: Half-caster slot progression starting at L2, up to 5th-level slots
summary: Prepare and cast paladin spells using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. Spell slots follow half-caster progression (rounding down).

name: Divine Smite
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
resourceCostSummary: Expends one spell slot; damage scales with slot level (2d8 base + 1d8 per slot level above 1st, max 5d8 or 6d8 vs undead/fiends)
rechargeSummary: Spell slots recharge on long rest
scalingSummary: Base 2d8 radiant; +1d8 per spell level above 1st (max 5d8); +1d8 vs undead/fiends
summary: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, you can choose to expend a spell slot to deal additional radiant damage. This is not an action — it's a decision made after the attack hits.

name: Divine Health
summary: You are immune to disease.

name: Extra Attack
summary: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: Aura of Protection
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: Whenever you or a friendly creature within 10 feet of you must make a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus equal to your Charisma modifier. You must be conscious to grant this bonus.

name: Aura of Courage
summary: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be frightened while you are conscious.

name: Improved Divine Smite
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
summary: Whenever you hit a creature with a melee weapon, the creature takes an extra 1d8 radiant damage. This stacks with Divine Smite.

name: Cleansing Touch
scalingSummary: Uses per long rest = Charisma modifier (min 1)
summary: Use an action to end one spell on yourself or one willing creature you touch. Uses per long rest equal to Charisma modifier.

name: Channel Divinity
scalingSummary: 1 use per rest at L3
summary: Shared resource pool powering oath-specific CD options. Paladin gains access at L3 via Sacred Oath; each oath provides distinct CD options (see subclass rows).

name: Sacred Weapon (Oath of Devotion)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using Channel Divinity, imbue one held weapon with positive energy. For 1 minute, add Charisma modifier to attack rolls (min +1). Weapon emits bright light 20 ft, dim light 20 ft.

name: Turn the Unholy (Oath of Devotion)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using Channel Divinity, present holy symbol; each fiend or undead within 30 ft that can see or hear you makes a Wisdom save. On failure, turned for 1 minute or until taking damage.

name: Aura of Devotion (Oath of Devotion)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft can't be charmed while you are conscious.

name: Purity of Spirit (Oath of Devotion)
summary: You are always under the effects of a protection from evil and good spell.

name: Holy Nimbus (Oath of Devotion)
summary: As an action, emanate an aura of sunlight for 1 minute. Bright light 30 ft, dim light 30 ft beyond. Enemy creatures starting their turn in bright light take 10 radiant damage. Advantage on saves vs fiend/undead spells.

name: Nature's Wrath (Oath of the Ancients)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using Channel Divinity, spectral vines ensnare a creature within 10 ft. Target chooses Strength or Dexterity save; on failure, restrained. Save repeats each turn.

name: Turn the Faithless (Oath of the Ancients)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using Channel Divinity, utter ancient words; each fey or fiend within 30 ft makes Wisdom save. On failure, turned for 1 minute or until taking damage.

name: Aura of Warding (Oath of the Ancients)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft have resistance to damage from spells.

name: Undying Sentinel (Oath of the Ancients)
trigger: When reduced to 0 hit points and not killed outright
summary: When reduced to 0 HP and not killed outright, you can choose to drop to 1 HP instead. Also immune to magical aging and ignore old age penalties.

name: Elder Champion (Oath of the Ancients)
summary: As an action, transform for 1 minute: regain 10 HP at start of each turn, cast paladin spells with bonus action casting time as if they were a bonus action, enemies within 10 ft have disadvantage on saves vs your paladin spells and CD options.

name: Abjure Enemy (Oath of Vengeance)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using Channel Divinity, one creature within 60 ft makes Wisdom save or be frightened (speed 0). Fiends/undead have disadvantage.

name: Vow of Enmity (Oath of Vengeance)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action using Channel Divinity, utter a vow against a creature within 10 ft. Gain advantage on attack rolls against that creature for 1 minute or until it drops to 0 HP.

name: Relentless Avenger (Oath of Vengeance)
trigger: When you hit a creature with an opportunity attack
summary: When you hit with an opportunity attack, you can move up to half your speed as part of the same reaction without provoking opportunity attacks.

name: Soul of Vengeance (Oath of Vengeance)
trigger: When a creature under your Vow of Enmity makes an attack
summary: Use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against a creature under your Vow of Enmity when it makes an attack, if it is within range.

name: Avenging Angel (Oath of Vengeance)
summary: As an action, transform for 1 hour: fly speed 60 ft, aura of menace 30 ft (enemies make Wis save or be frightened for 1 minute on entering or starting turn).

name: Control Undead (Oathbreaker)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using CD, target one undead within 30 ft. Wisdom save or obey commands for 24 hours. Undead with CR ≥ paladin level are immune.

name: Dreadful Aspect (Oathbreaker)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft makes Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.

name: Aura of Hate (Oathbreaker)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: Paladin and any fiends/undead within 10 ft gain bonus to melee weapon damage equal to Charisma modifier (min +1).

name: Supernatural Resistance (Oathbreaker)
summary: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.

name: Dread Lord (Oathbreaker)
summary: As an action, surround yourself with an aura of gloom for 1 minute. Enemies frightened by you that start their turn in the aura take 4d10 psychic damage. Paladin and chosen creatures in aura are draped in deeper shadow.

name: Conquering Presence (Oath of Conquest)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft makes Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute. Save repeats each turn.

name: Guided Strike (Oath of Conquest)
trigger: When you make an attack roll (after seeing the roll, before DM says hit/miss)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: Use Channel Divinity to gain +10 to an attack roll. Decision made after seeing the d20 roll but before the DM declares hit/miss.

name: Aura of Conquest (Oath of Conquest)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: Creatures frightened of you have speed 0 while in aura. A frightened creature that starts its turn in the aura takes psychic damage equal to half your paladin level.

name: Scornful Rebuke (Oath of Conquest)
trigger: When a creature hits you with an attack
summary: Whenever a creature hits you with an attack, it takes psychic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1), if you are not incapacitated.

name: Invincible Conqueror (Oath of Conquest)
summary: As an action, become an avatar of conquest for 1 minute: resistance to all damage, one additional attack as part of Attack action, critical hit range 19-20.

name: Emissary of Peace (Oath of Redemption)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action using CD, gain +5 bonus to Charisma (Persuasion) checks for 10 minutes.

name: Rebuke the Violent (Oath of Redemption)
trigger: Immediately after an attacker within 30 ft deals damage to a creature other than you
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: Use your reaction and CD to force the attacker to make a Wisdom save. On failure, attacker takes radiant damage equal to the damage it just dealt.

name: Aura of the Guardian (Oath of Redemption)
trigger: When a creature within 10 ft takes damage
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost; paladin takes the damage instead
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: Use your reaction to magically take the damage instead of the original target. Cannot be reduced or prevented. Only transfers damage, not other effects.

name: Protective Spirit (Oath of Redemption)
trigger: At the end of each of your turns in combat, if you are below half HP and not incapacitated
scalingSummary: 1d6 + half paladin level HP regained per turn
summary: If you end your turn in combat with fewer than half your HP and are not incapacitated, regain 1d6 + half your paladin level HP.

name: Emissary of Redemption (Oath of Redemption)
summary: Always-on: resistance to all damage dealt by other creatures. When a creature hits you, it takes radiant damage equal to half the damage you take.

name: Peerless Athlete (Oath of Glory)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action using CD, for 10 minutes: advantage on Athletics/Acrobatics, double carry capacity, +10 ft to long/high jump distance.

name: Inspiring Smite (Oath of Glory)
trigger: Immediately after dealing damage with Divine Smite
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Temp HP = 2d8 + paladin level, distributed among chosen creatures
summary: As a bonus action after dealing Divine Smite damage, use CD to distribute 2d8 + paladin level temporary HP among creatures of your choice within 30 ft.

name: Aura of Alacrity (Oath of Glory)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 10 ft at L18
summary: Your walking speed increases by 10 ft. Allies who start their turn within 5 ft of you have walking speed increased by 10 ft until end of their turn.

name: Glorious Defense (Oath of Glory)
trigger: When you or a creature within 10 ft is hit by an attack roll
scalingSummary: Uses = Charisma modifier (min 1)
summary: Use reaction to grant bonus to AC equal to Charisma modifier, potentially causing the attack to miss. If the attack misses, you can make one weapon attack against the attacker as part of the same reaction.

name: Living Legend (Oath of Glory)
summary: As a bonus action, gain for 1 minute: advantage on Charisma checks, once per turn turn a missed weapon attack into a hit, use reaction to reroll a failed saving throw.

name: Abjure the Extraplanar (Oath of the Watchers)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As an action using CD, each aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend within 30 ft makes Wisdom save. On failure, turned for 1 minute or until taking damage.

name: Watcher's Will (Oath of the Watchers)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Targets = Charisma modifier (min 1)
summary: As an action using CD, choose up to Charisma modifier creatures within 30 ft. For 1 minute, chosen creatures have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

name: Aura of the Sentinel (Oath of the Watchers)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
summary: When you and chosen creatures within 10 ft roll initiative, gain a bonus to initiative equal to your proficiency bonus.

name: Vigilant Rebuke (Oath of the Watchers)
trigger: When you or a creature within 30 ft succeeds on an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw
summary: Use reaction to deal 2d8 + Charisma modifier force damage to the creature that forced the saving throw.

name: Mortal Bulwark (Oath of the Watchers)
summary: As a bonus action, for 1 minute: truesight 120 ft, advantage on attacks vs aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends, when hitting such a creature can force Charisma save or banish to native plane.

name: Champion Challenge (Oath of the Crown)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft makes Wisdom save. On failure, can't willingly move more than 30 ft away from you.

name: Turn the Tide (Oath of the Crown)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
summary: As a bonus action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft that can hear you and has no more than half HP regains 1d6 + Charisma modifier HP.

name: Divine Allegiance (Oath of the Crown)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft takes damage
resourceCostSummary: Paladin takes the damage instead; cannot be reduced or prevented
summary: Use your reaction to take the damage instead of the target. The damage cannot be reduced or prevented.

name: Unyielding Spirit (Oath of the Crown)
summary: Advantage on saving throws against being paralyzed or stunned.

name: Exalted Champion (Oath of the Crown)
summary: As an action, for 1 hour: resistance to B/P/S from nonmagical weapons, allies within 30 ft have advantage on death saves, advantage on Wisdom saves.

name: Favored Enemy
scalingSummary: 1 enemy type at L1, 1 more at L6, 1 more at L14
summary: Choose a type of favored enemy. Advantage on Survival checks to track them and Intelligence checks to recall information about them. Learn one language spoken by them.

name: Natural Explorer
scalingSummary: 1 terrain at L1, 1 more at L6, 1 more at L10
summary: When in favored terrain: difficult terrain doesn't slow group travel, can't become lost, remain alert to danger while foraging/tracking/navigating, can move stealthily at normal pace alone, find twice the food while foraging, double proficiency on Int/Wis checks about terrain.

name: Fighting Style
summary: Choose one Fighting Style: Archery (+2 ranged attacks), Defense (+1 AC), Dueling (+2 damage), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability mod to off-hand damage).

name: Spellcasting (Ranger)
scalingSummary: Half caster (known spells); Wisdom-based; slots start at L2
summary: Known caster: learn spells from the ranger list. Half-caster slot progression starting at L2. 2 spells known at L2, scaling to 11.

name: Primeval Awareness
rechargeSummary: Spell slots recharge on long rest
summary: Expend a spell slot to sense whether specific creature types (aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, undead) are present within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain) for 1 minute per slot level.

name: Extra Attack
summary: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

name: Land's Stride
summary: Nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. Pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed or damaged. Advantage on saves against magically created plant hazards.

name: Hide in Plain Sight
summary: Spend 1 minute creating camouflage. +10 to Dexterity (Stealth) while stationary against that background. Must prepare new camouflage to change locations.

name: Vanish
summary: Can take the Hide action as a bonus action. Also can't be tracked by nonmagical means unless you choose to leave a trail.

name: Feral Senses
summary: No disadvantage on attacks against invisible creatures you can't see. Aware of invisible creatures within 30 ft (not hidden from you unless they successfully Hide).

name: Foe Slayer
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting a favored enemy with a weapon attack
summary: Add Wisdom modifier to one attack roll or damage roll against a favored enemy per turn. Can apply after seeing the roll but before the result.

name: Colossus Slayer (Hunter)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting a creature below its HP maximum with a weapon attack
summary: Deal an extra 1d8 damage to a wounded creature.

name: Giant Killer (Hunter)
trigger: When a Large or larger creature within 5 ft hits or misses you with an attack
summary: Use reaction to make one weapon attack against the triggering creature.

name: Horde Breaker (Hunter)
trigger: Once per turn, when making a weapon attack
summary: Make an additional attack against a different creature within 5 ft of the original target and within weapon range.

name: Volley (Hunter)
summary: Use an action to make a ranged attack against every creature in a 10-ft-radius area within weapon range. Each target requires a separate attack roll.

name: Whirlwind Attack (Hunter)
summary: Use an action to make a melee attack against every creature within 5 ft of you. Each target requires a separate attack roll.

name: Ranger's Companion (Beast Master - 2014)
scalingSummary: Companion stats scale with ranger level
summary: Gain a beast companion (CR 1/4 or lower). Companion acts on your initiative. You can command it verbally at no action cost on your turn to move, or use your action to command it to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Dodge, or Help.

name: Dread Ambusher (Gloom Stalker)
summary: At the start of first turn of each combat, gain +10 ft walking speed. If taking the Attack action on that turn, make one additional weapon attack that deals an extra 1d8 damage on hit.

name: Umbral Sight (Gloom Stalker)
summary: Gain darkvision 60 ft (or +30 ft if already have darkvision). While in darkness, invisible to creatures relying on darkvision to see you.

name: Stalker's Flurry (Gloom Stalker)
trigger: When you miss with a weapon attack during the Attack action
summary: Make one additional weapon attack against the same target once per turn when you miss.

name: Shadowy Dodge (Gloom Stalker)
trigger: When attacked by a creature you can see
summary: Use reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll.

name: Planar Warrior (Horizon Walker)
scalingSummary: Damage: 1d8 force at L3, 2d8 at L11
summary: As a bonus action, choose a creature within 30 ft. Next time you hit it this turn with a weapon attack, all damage becomes force and deal extra 1d8 force.

name: Distant Strike (Horizon Walker)
summary: When taking the Attack action, can teleport up to 10 ft before each attack. If attacking at least two different creatures, make one additional attack against a third creature.

name: Slayer's Prey (Monster Slayer)
scalingSummary: Extra damage: 1d6
summary: As a bonus action, designate a creature within 60 ft. First weapon attack hitting it each turn deals an extra 1d6 damage. Lasts until target dies, you rest, or you designate a new target.

name: Slayer's Counter (Monster Slayer)
trigger: When your Slayer's Prey target forces you to make a saving throw
summary: Use reaction to make one weapon attack against the creature. If the attack hits, your save automatically succeeds in addition to damage.

name: Dreadful Strikes (Fey Wanderer)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting with a weapon attack
scalingSummary: 1d4 psychic at L3, 1d6 at L11
summary: Deal extra 1d4 psychic damage once per turn on a weapon hit. Increases at L11.

name: Beguiling Twist (Fey Wanderer)
trigger: When you or a creature within 120 ft succeeds on a save against being charmed or frightened
summary: Use reaction to force a different creature within 120 ft to make a Wisdom save or be charmed or frightened (your choice) for 1 minute.

name: Gathered Swarm (Swarmkeeper)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting with an attack
scalingSummary: Damage: 1d6 piercing at L3, extra at L11
summary: After hitting a creature, the swarm can: deal 1d6 piercing damage, force Str save or move target 15 ft horizontally, or move yourself 5 ft horizontally.

name: Expertise
scalingSummary: 2 skills at L1, 2 more at L6
summary: Double proficiency bonus for chosen skills (or thieves' tools). Pick 2 at L1, 2 more at L6.

name: Sneak Attack
trigger: Once per turn, when you hit with an attack using a finesse or ranged weapon, and you have advantage OR an ally is within 5 ft of the target
rechargeSummary: Once per turn (not once per round)
scalingSummary: Extra damage: 1d6 at L1, +1d6 per odd level (2d6 at L3, ..., 10d6 at L19)
summary: Deal extra damage on a hit when conditions are met. Does not require advantage if an enemy of the target is within 5 ft of it and you don't have disadvantage.

name: Cunning Action
summary: You can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action on your turn.

name: Uncanny Dodge
trigger: When an attacker you can see hits you with an attack
summary: Use your reaction to halve the damage from an attack that hits you.

name: Evasion
summary: When subjected to a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on success and half damage on failure.

name: Reliable Talent
summary: When making an ability check that uses your proficiency bonus, treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

name: Blindsense
summary: If able to hear, aware of the location of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 ft.

name: Slippery Mind
summary: Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

name: Elusive
summary: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

name: Stroke of Luck
trigger: When you miss with an attack roll or fail an ability check
summary: When you miss with an attack, you can turn it into a hit. When you fail an ability check, treat the d20 roll as a 20. Once per short or long rest.

name: Fast Hands (Thief)
summary: Expands Cunning Action: can use bonus action to make Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm trap/open lock, or take the Use an Object action.

name: Second-Story Work (Thief)
summary: Climbing doesn't cost extra movement. Running jump distance increases by Dexterity modifier in feet.

name: Supreme Sneak (Thief)
summary: Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks if moving no more than half speed on the same turn.

name: Use Magic Device (Thief)
summary: Ignore all class, race, and level requirements on magic items.

name: Thief's Reflexes (Thief)
summary: Take two turns during the first round of combat: first at normal initiative, second at initiative minus 10.

name: Assassinate (Assassin)
summary: Advantage on attacks against creatures that haven't taken a turn yet. Any hit against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

name: Death Strike (Assassin)
trigger: When you hit a surprised creature with an attack
summary: Target makes Constitution save (DC 8 + Dex mod + PB). On failure, double the attack's damage.

name: Mage Hand Legerdemain (Arcane Trickster)
summary: Mage hand becomes invisible and can stow/retrieve objects, use thieves' tools at range, and perform additional pickpocket actions. Can be controlled with Cunning Action bonus action.

name: Magical Ambush (Arcane Trickster)
summary: If hidden when casting a spell on a creature, the target has disadvantage on any saving throw against the spell this turn.

name: Versatile Trickster (Arcane Trickster)
summary: As a bonus action, designate a creature within 5 ft of your mage hand. Gain advantage on attacks against it until end of turn.

name: Spell Thief (Arcane Trickster)
trigger: Immediately after a creature casts a spell that targets you or includes you in its area
summary: Force the caster to make a save using its spellcasting ability vs your spell DC. On failure, you steal the spell: the caster loses the slot and you can cast the spell using your slots for 8 hours.

name: Eye for Detail (Inquisitive)
summary: Use a bonus action to make a Perception check to spot hidden creatures/objects or an Investigation check to uncover clues.

name: Insightful Fighting (Inquisitive)
summary: As a bonus action, make contested Insight vs Deception check against a creature. On success, can use Sneak Attack against it for 1 minute without advantage or ally proximity.

name: Unerring Eye (Inquisitive)
scalingSummary: Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1)
summary: As an action, sense illusions, shapechangers, and deception magic within 30 ft if not blinded or deafened.

name: Eye for Weakness (Inquisitive)
trigger: When your Insightful Fighting applies
summary: Sneak Attack damage against the Insightful Fighting target increases by 3d6.

name: Master of Tactics (Mastermind)
summary: Can use the Help action as a bonus action. When using Help to aid an attack, the target can be within 30 ft instead of 5 ft.

name: Misdirection (Mastermind)
trigger: When you are targeted by an attack while a creature within 5 ft is granting you cover
summary: Use reaction to have the attack target the creature granting you cover instead of you.

name: Skirmisher (Scout)
trigger: When an enemy ends its turn within 5 ft of you
summary: Use reaction to move up to half your speed. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

name: Ambush Master (Scout)
summary: Advantage on initiative rolls. First creature you hit in round 1 grants advantage to all attackers against it until start of your next turn.

name: Sudden Strike (Scout)
trigger: When you take the Attack action
summary: Make one additional attack as a bonus action. This can benefit from Sneak Attack even if already used this turn (but must target a different creature).

name: Fancy Footwork (Swashbuckler)
summary: During your turn, if you make a melee attack against a creature, that creature can't make opportunity attacks against you for the rest of the turn.

name: Rakish Audacity (Swashbuckler)
summary: Add Charisma modifier to initiative. Can Sneak Attack without advantage if no other creatures are within 5 ft of you and you don't have disadvantage.

name: Panache (Swashbuckler)
summary: As an action, make contested Charisma (Persuasion) vs Wisdom (Insight). Hostile target on failure: disadvantage on attacks vs others, can't OA others, for 1 minute. Non-hostile: charmed.

name: Master Duelist (Swashbuckler)
trigger: When you miss with an attack roll
summary: Reroll a missed attack with advantage. Once per short/long rest.

name: Wails from the Grave (Phantom)
trigger: Immediately after dealing Sneak Attack damage
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; damage = half Sneak Attack dice (round up) to second target
summary: After Sneak Attack, deal necrotic damage equal to half your SA dice to a second creature within 30 ft of the first.

name: Tokens of the Departed (Phantom)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft dies
