rechargeSummary: Create soul trinket as reaction; max PB trinkets at once
summary: When a creature dies within 30 ft, use reaction to create a soul trinket. Trinkets can add a die to death/Con saves (destroying the trinket), fuel Wails from the Grave without spending its use, or let you ask the spirit one question.

name: Ghost Walk (Phantom)
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or expend a soul trinket to use again)
summary: As a bonus action, assume spectral form. Fly speed 10 ft (hover), attacks have disadvantage against you, can move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain (1d10 force damage if ending turn inside). Lasts until end of turn or bonus action dismiss.

name: Psychic Blades (Soulknife)
scalingSummary: Manifest psychic blades as part of Attack action; 1d6 psychic + ability mod; secondary blade 1d4 as bonus action
summary: Whenever you take the Attack action, manifest a psychic blade (1d6 + mod psychic, 60 ft range). Can manifest a second blade as a bonus action (1d4 psychic). Blades vanish after hit or miss.

name: Psi-Bolstered Knack (Soulknife)
trigger: When you fail an ability check using a skill or tool you're proficient with
resourceCostSummary: 1 Psionic Energy die (only expended if check succeeds)
scalingSummary: Die: d6 at L3, d8 at L5, d10 at L11, d12 at L17
summary: Roll a Psionic Energy die and add to the check. Die only expended if the roll turns failure to success.

name: Psychic Teleportation (Soulknife)
summary: As a bonus action, manifest a psychic blade and throw it to an unoccupied space up to 10× the die roll in feet. Teleport to that space.

name: Psychic Veil (Soulknife)
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (free once per long rest; additional uses cost 1 Psionic Energy die)
rechargeSummary: One free use per long rest
summary: As an action, become invisible for 1 hour or until dismissed. Ends early on dealing damage or forcing a saving throw.

name: Rend Mind (Soulknife)
trigger: When using Psychic Blades to deal Sneak Attack damage
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (free once per long rest; additional uses cost 3 Psionic Energy dice)
rechargeSummary: One free use per long rest
summary: Target makes Wisdom save or be stunned for 1 minute. Repeats save at end of each turn. Once free per long rest; subsequent uses cost 3 dice.

name: Spellcasting (Sorcerer)
scalingSummary: Full caster (known); Charisma-based; 2 spells known at L1, scaling to 15
summary: Known caster — learn a fixed number of sorcerer spells. Full caster slot progression. 4 cantrips at L1. Cannot swap spells as freely as prepared casters.

name: Font of Magic
scalingSummary: Points = sorcerer level (2 at L2, 20 at L20)
summary: Gain sorcery points. Flexible Casting: as a bonus action, convert points to spell slots or slots to points. Conversion rates: 1st=2, 2nd=3, 3rd=5, 4th=6, 5th=7 points.

name: Metamagic
scalingSummary: 2 options at L3, 3 at L10, 4 at L17
summary: Learn Metamagic options that modify spells: Careful (save protection, 1 SP), Distant (2× range, 1 SP), Empowered (reroll damage dice, 1 SP), Extended (2× duration, 1 SP), Heightened (disadvantage on save, 3 SP), Quickened (bonus action cast, 2 SP), Subtle (no components, 1 SP), Twinned (double target, SP = spell level).

name: Sorcerous Restoration
trigger: When rolling initiative with 0 sorcery points
summary: Regain 4 sorcery points when rolling initiative with none left.

name: Elemental Affinity (Draconic Bloodline)
scalingSummary: Add Charisma modifier to one damage roll of spells matching draconic element
summary: Add Charisma modifier to one damage roll when casting a spell dealing your draconic element's damage. Can also spend 1 SP to gain resistance to that damage type for 1 hour.

name: Dragon Wings (Draconic Bloodline)
summary: As a bonus action, manifest spectral dragon wings granting fly speed equal to current walking speed. Lasts until dismissed as a bonus action.

name: Draconic Presence (Draconic Bloodline)
summary: Spend 5 SP as an action to project an aura of awe/fear (60 ft) for 1 minute (concentration). Creatures make Wis save or be charmed (awe) or frightened (fear).

name: Tides of Chaos (Wild Magic)
trigger: When making an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or when DM forces a Wild Magic Surge before next long rest)
summary: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. DM can have you roll on Wild Magic Surge table to regain use before a long rest.

name: Bend Luck (Wild Magic)
trigger: When a creature you can see makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw
summary: Spend 2 SP as a reaction to add or subtract 1d4 from the roll.

name: Favored by the Gods (Divine Soul)
trigger: When failing a saving throw or missing with an attack roll
summary: Add 2d4 to the failed save or missed attack, potentially turning it into a success.

name: Tempestuous Magic (Storm Sorcery)
trigger: Immediately before or after casting a levelled spell
summary: Use a bonus action to fly up to 10 ft without provoking opportunity attacks.

name: Heart of the Storm (Storm Sorcery)
trigger: When casting a spell of 1st+ level dealing lightning or thunder damage
scalingSummary: Damage = half sorcerer level
summary: Deal lightning or thunder damage equal to half sorcerer level to up to 3 creatures of your choice within 10 ft.

name: Storm's Fury (Storm Sorcery)
trigger: When hit by a melee attack
scalingSummary: Damage = half sorcerer level
summary: Use reaction to deal lightning damage equal to half sorcerer level to the attacker. On failed Strength save, pushed 20 ft away.

name: Hound of Ill Omen (Shadow Magic)
summary: Spend 3 SP as a bonus action to summon a dire wolf hound targeting a creature within 120 ft. Hound attacks the target and while within 5 ft of it, the target has disadvantage on saves vs your spells.

name: Umbral Form (Shadow Magic)
summary: Spend 6 SP as a bonus action to transform into a shadow form for 1 minute (concentration). Resistance to all damage but force and radiant. Can move through occupied spaces and objects (1d10 force if ending inside).

name: Revelation in Flesh (Aberrant Mind)
summary: Spend SP as a bonus action to transform for 10 minutes: see invisibility (1 SP), fly speed = walking + hover (2 SP), swim speed = 2× walking + water breathing (1 SP), squeeze through 1-inch gaps (1 SP).

name: Bastion of Law (Clockwork Soul)
scalingSummary: Ward HP = 5 × SP spent
summary: As an action, spend SP to create a protective ward on yourself or an ally within 30 ft. Ward absorbs damage (d8s equal to 5×SP) until depleted or next long rest.

name: Pact Magic
scalingSummary: 1 slot at L1, 2 at L2, 3 at L11, 4 at L17; slot level: 1st at L1, 2nd at L3, 3rd at L5, 4th at L7, 5th at L9
summary: Cast warlock spells using pact magic slots that recharge on a short rest. All slots are the same (maximum) level. Known caster: 2 spells at L1, scaling to 15.

name: Eldritch Invocations
scalingSummary: 2 invocations at L2, 3 at L5, 4 at L7, 5 at L9, 6 at L12, 7 at L15, 8 at L18
summary: Choose eldritch invocations that grant passive benefits, at-will spells, or modifications to eldritch blast. Some invocations grant specific actions (e.g., Bewitching Whispers: cast compulsion) or modifications.

name: Pact Boon
summary: Choose a pact boon: Pact of the Chain (find familiar with special forms, bonus action to command to attack), Pact of the Blade (summon pact weapon as action, proficiency, can be bonded magic weapon), Pact of the Tome (Book of Shadows with 3 cantrips from any list), Pact of the Talisman (wearer adds d4 to failed ability checks, PB uses/LR).

name: Mystic Arcanum
scalingSummary: 6th-level arcanum at L11, 7th at L13, 8th at L15, 9th at L17
summary: Learn and cast one high-level warlock spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot. Each arcanum is a separate spell known and use.

name: Eldritch Master
summary: Spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended pact magic slots. Once per long rest.

name: Dark One's Blessing (The Fiend)
trigger: When reducing a hostile creature to 0 HP
scalingSummary: Temp HP = Charisma modifier + warlock level
summary: Gain temporary HP equal to Charisma modifier + warlock level when you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP.

name: Dark One's Own Luck (The Fiend)
trigger: When making an ability check or saving throw
summary: Add 1d10 to an ability check or saving throw. Decide after seeing the d20 but before DM declares result.

name: Hurl Through Hell (The Fiend)
trigger: Once per long rest, when hitting a creature with an attack
summary: Target vanishes on a quick trip through the lower planes. It returns at end of your next turn having taken 10d10 psychic damage if not a fiend.

name: Hexblade's Curse (The Hexblade)
summary: As a bonus action, curse a creature within 30 ft for 1 minute. You crit on 19-20 against it, add proficiency to damage, and regain warlock level + Cha HP if it dies.

name: Accursed Specter (The Hexblade)
trigger: When slaying a humanoid (once per long rest)
summary: When you slay a humanoid, raise its spirit as a specter under your control that lasts until end of next long rest.

name: Armor of Hexes (The Hexblade)
trigger: When your Hexblade's Curse target hits you with an attack
summary: Use reaction to roll a d6. On 4+, the attack misses regardless of the attack roll.

name: Healing Light (The Celestial)
scalingSummary: Dice pool = 1 + warlock level (d6s)
summary: As a bonus action, spend any number of d6s from your pool to heal a creature within 60 ft.

name: Searing Vengeance (The Celestial)
trigger: When reduced to 0 HP or making a death save at the start of your turn
summary: Regain half your max HP, stand up, and deal 2d8 + Cha radiant damage to enemies of choice within 30 ft (blind them on failed Con save).

name: Tentacle of the Deeps (The Fathomless)
scalingSummary: Damage: 1d8 cold; 2d8 at L10
summary: As a bonus action, summon a 10-ft tentacle within 60 ft for 1 minute. Make a melee spell attack as a bonus action: 1d8 cold damage, reduce target speed by 10 ft until start of your next turn.

name: Genie's Wrath (The Genie)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting with an attack roll
scalingSummary: +PB damage of element type (bludgeoning for Dao, cold for Marid, fire for Efreeti, thunder for Djinni)
summary: Add proficiency bonus damage of your genie's element type to one attack per turn.

name: Limited Wish (The Genie)
summary: As an action, replicate any 6th-level-or-lower spell that takes 1 action to cast. No material components up to 1000 gp. Recharges after 1d4 long rests.

name: Form of Dread (The Undead)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: As a bonus action, transform for 1 minute. Gain 1d10+warlock level temp HP. Once per turn when hitting with an attack, can force target to make Wis save or be frightened. Immune to frightened at L10.

name: Spellcasting (Wizard)
scalingSummary: Full caster; prepared from spellbook (Intelligence); 6 spells at L1, +2 per level
summary: Prepare spells from a personal spellbook using Intelligence. Learn 6 spells at L1, +2 per level. Can ritually cast unprepared ritual spells from spellbook. Full caster slot progression.

name: Arcane Recovery
rechargeSummary: Once per long rest (during short rest)
scalingSummary: Recover combined spell levels = half wizard level (round up), max 5th-level slots
summary: During a short rest, recover expended spell slots totaling up to half your wizard level (rounded up). No slot can be 6th level or higher.

name: Spell Mastery
summary: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level wizard spell. Can cast them at their lowest level without expending spell slots. Can change choices after 8 hours of study.

name: Signature Spells
summary: Choose two 3rd-level wizard spells as signature spells. Always prepared, and can cast each once at 3rd level without expending a spell slot per short or long rest.

name: Arcane Ward (School of Abjuration)
scalingSummary: Ward HP = 2×wizard level + Int modifier; regenerates 2×spell level when casting abjuration spells
summary: Gain a magical ward absorbing damage. When casting an abjuration spell, ward regains HP equal to twice spell level. At L6, can use reaction to have ward absorb damage for an ally within 30 ft.

name: Projected Ward (School of Abjuration)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft takes damage
summary: Use reaction to have your Arcane Ward absorb the damage instead of the targeted ally.

name: Portent (School of Divination)
trigger: When any creature you can see makes an attack roll, saving throw, or ability check
scalingSummary: 2 pre-rolled d20s at L2, 3 at L14
summary: After each long rest, pre-roll 2 d20s (3 at L14). Before any attack/save/check result is declared, you can replace the d20 roll with one of your portent dice.

name: Hypnotic Gaze (School of Enchantment)
rechargeSummary: Once per creature per long rest
summary: As an action, choose a creature within 5 ft. Wis save or charmed and incapacitated with speed 0. Maintain as action each subsequent turn. Ends if target takes damage or can't see/hear you.

name: Instinctive Charm (School of Enchantment)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft makes an attack roll against you
rechargeSummary: Once per creature per long rest
summary: Use reaction to force the attacker (if not immune to charmed) to make Wis save. On failure, redirect the attack to the closest creature (other than you or itself).

name: Sculpt Spells (School of Evocation)
scalingSummary: Protect up to 1 + spell level creatures
summary: When casting an evocation spell, choose 1 + spell level creatures to automatically succeed their save and take no damage if they would normally take half.

name: Overchannel (School of Evocation)
trigger: When casting a wizard evocation spell of 1st-5th level that deals damage
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost; self-damage on reuse
rechargeSummary: Once per long rest free; subsequent uses cause d12 necrotic damage per spell level
summary: Maximize the damage of a 1st-5th level evocation spell. Second use before a long rest deals necrotic damage per spell level (cumulative).

name: Illusory Self (School of Illusion)
trigger: When a creature makes an attack roll against you
summary: Use reaction to create an illusory duplicate. The attack automatically misses.

name: Grim Harvest (School of Necromancy)
trigger: When killing a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher
scalingSummary: HP regain = 2× spell level (3× if necromancy spell)
summary: Regain HP equal to twice the spell's level (or 3× if necromancy) when killing a creature with a spell. Doesn't work on constructs or undead.

name: Transmuter's Stone (School of Transmutation)
rechargeSummary: Can be remade on long rest; destroyed if new one made
summary: Spend 8 hours creating a transmuter's stone granting one benefit to holder: darkvision 60 ft, +10 speed, proficiency in Con saves, or resistance to one of acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder. Can change the benefit when casting a transmutation spell of 1st+.

name: Bladesong (Bladesinging)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: As a bonus action, enter bladesong for 1 minute. Gain: +Int to AC, +10 ft walking speed, advantage on Acrobatics, +Int to Con saves for concentration. Ends on incapacitation, donning medium/heavy armor/shield, or two-handed weapon use.

name: Song of Defense (Bladesinging)
trigger: When taking damage
resourceCostSummary: Expend a spell slot; reduce damage by 5× spell level
rechargeSummary: Spell slots recharge on long rest
summary: When taking damage while Bladesong is active, expend a spell slot to reduce the damage by 5× the slot's level.

name: Arcane Deflection (War Magic)
trigger: When hit by an attack or failing a saving throw
summary: Use reaction to gain +2 AC against that attack or +4 on that saving throw. Cannot cast spells other than cantrips until end of next turn.

name: Power Surge (War Magic)
trigger: When dealing damage with a wizard spell
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (free; gain one when you dispel or counterspell, or on short rest)
rechargeSummary: Regain 1 on short rest; gain one when using Dispel Magic or Counterspell
scalingSummary: Extra force damage = half wizard level
summary: Deal extra force damage equal to half wizard level to one target of a spell. Max one surge per spell.

name: Chronal Shift (School of Chronurgy)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw (after seeing the roll)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: Use reaction to force the creature to reroll the d20. Must use the new roll.

name: Momentary Stasis (School of Chronurgy)
summary: As an action, force a Large or smaller creature within 60 ft to make Con save or be incapacitated with speed 0 until end of your next turn. On success, creature has half speed and can take one of action/bonus/reaction.

name: Alert
summary: +5 to initiative, can't be surprised, hidden creatures don't gain advantage on attacks against you.

name: Charger
trigger: When using the Dash action and moving at least 10 ft straight toward a target
summary: When you Dash, make a melee weapon attack as a bonus action with +5 to the damage roll (or shove up to 10 ft).

name: Crossbow Expert
summary: Ignore loading property of crossbows. No disadvantage on ranged attacks while within 5 ft of hostile creature. When using Attack action with one-handed weapon, can use bonus action to attack with hand crossbow.

name: Defensive Duelist
trigger: When hit by a melee attack while wielding a finesse weapon
scalingSummary: +proficiency bonus to AC (scales with level)
summary: Add proficiency bonus to AC against one melee attack that hits you, potentially causing it to miss.

name: Dual Wielder
summary: +1 AC while dual wielding. Can use two-weapon fighting with non-light weapons. Can draw/stow two weapons instead of one.

name: Dwarf Fortitude
trigger: When taking the Dodge action
rechargeSummary: Hit Dice recharge on long rest
summary: When you take the Dodge action, spend a Hit Die to heal yourself. +1 Constitution.

name: Fade Away (Gnome)
trigger: When taking damage
summary: Use reaction to become invisible until the start of your next turn. +1 Dex or Int.

name: Gift of the Chromatic Dragon
summary: As a bonus action, touch a weapon to infuse it with elemental energy for 1 minute: +1d4 acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison damage on hit. Also gain reactive resistance to one of those damage types (reaction, PB/LR).

name: Gift of the Gem Dragon
trigger: When hit by an attack
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: Use reaction to deal 2d8 force damage to creatures within 10 ft (Str save half) and push them 10 ft away. +1 Int/Wis/Cha.

name: Gift of the Metallic Dragon
trigger: When you or a creature within 5 ft is hit by an attack
scalingSummary: Uses = PB
summary: Use reaction to manifest spectral wings, adding PB to AC against the triggering attack. Also learn cure wounds (1/LR).

name: Grappler
summary: Advantage on attacks against creatures you're grappling. Can use an action to restrain a grappled creature (you also become restrained).

name: Great Weapon Master
summary: On crit or killing blow with melee weapon, make one additional melee weapon attack as a bonus action. Can take -5 to attack for +10 damage with heavy weapons.

name: Healer
rechargeSummary: Per creature per short or long rest (for the larger heal)
scalingSummary: Stabilize restores 1 HP; larger heal restores 1d6+4+target's HD count HP
summary: As an action, use healer's kit to stabilize a dying creature and restore 1 HP. As an action, restore 1d6+4+target's max Hit Dice HP to a creature (once per creature per rest).

name: Inspiring Leader
rechargeSummary: Per creature per short or long rest
scalingSummary: Temp HP = level + Charisma modifier
summary: Spend 10 minutes inspiring up to 6 allies. Each gains temp HP equal to your level + Charisma modifier.

name: Mage Slayer
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft casts a spell
summary: Use reaction to make a melee weapon attack against a creature within 5 ft that casts a spell. Also gain advantage on saves against spells cast by creatures within 5 ft.

name: Martial Adept
summary: Learn 2 Battle Master maneuvers. Gain 1 superiority die (d6). Functions identically to Battle Master's Combat Superiority.

name: Metamagic Adept
summary: Learn 2 Metamagic options and gain 2 sorcery points. Functions identically to Sorcerer's Metamagic.

name: Mobile
summary: +10 ft speed. When using Dash, difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. After making a melee attack against a creature, that creature can't make opportunity attacks against you for the rest of the turn.

name: Orcish Fury (Half-Orc)
trigger: Immediately after using Relentless Endurance
summary: Use reaction to make one weapon attack after Relentless Endurance triggers. Also add one extra weapon die to a hit once per short/long rest.

name: Poisoner
summary: Apply poison to a weapon as a bonus action (normally an action). Attacks ignore resistance to poison damage.

name: Polearm Master
trigger: When taking the Attack action with a glaive, halberd, quarterstaff, or spear
summary: Make a bonus action attack with the butt end (1d4 bludgeoning). Also, creatures provoke opportunity attacks when they enter your reach with a polearm.

name: Savage Attacker
summary: Once per turn when rolling melee weapon damage, can reroll the weapon's damage dice and use either total.

name: Second Chance (Halfling)
trigger: When hit by an attack
summary: Force the attacker to reroll the attack roll. +1 Dex/Con/Cha.

name: Sentinel
summary: Hitting with an OA reduces target's speed to 0. Can make OA even if target used Disengage. When a creature within 5 ft attacks someone else, use reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it.

name: Sharpshooter
summary: Ranged attacks ignore half and three-quarters cover. No disadvantage at long range. Can take -5 to attack for +10 damage on ranged weapon attacks.

name: Shield Master
trigger: When taking the Attack action
summary: Use a bonus action to shove a creature within 5 ft. Add shield's AC bonus to Dexterity saves against spells/harmful effects. On successful Dex save for half damage, use reaction to take no damage.

name: Slasher
trigger: When hitting with slashing damage
summary: Reduce target's speed by 10 ft until start of your next turn. On a critical hit, target has disadvantage on all attack rolls until start of your next turn.

name: Tavern Brawler
trigger: When hitting a creature with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon
summary: Use a bonus action to grapple a creature you hit with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon on the same turn. +1 Str/Con.

name: Telekinetic
summary: Learn mage hand (invisible, no components, extended range). As a bonus action, attempt to telekinetically shove a creature within 30 ft (Str save or moved 5 ft).

name: War Caster
summary: Advantage on Con saves to maintain concentration. Can perform somatic components with weapon/shield in hand. When a creature's movement provokes an OA, can use reaction to cast a spell targeting only that creature instead of making a weapon attack.

name: Crusher
trigger: When hitting with bludgeoning damage
summary: Move target 5 ft to an unoccupied space. On a critical hit, all attack rolls against that creature have advantage until start of your next turn.

name: Piercer
summary: Once per turn, reroll one piercing damage die. On critical hit, roll one additional damage die.

name: Elven Accuracy
summary: When you have advantage on a Dex/Int/Wis/Cha attack roll, reroll one of the d20s. Effectively triple advantage.

name: Lucky
trigger: When making an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, or when an attack roll is made against you
scalingSummary: 3 luck points
summary: Spend a luck point to roll an additional d20 and choose which to use. You choose whether to use this before or after the original roll, but before the outcome is determined.
